name: IRC_MP_BENEFITS_VL
query: SELECT B.BENEFIT_ID BENEFIT_ID, B.GIG_ID GIG_ID, TL.BENEFIT_NAME BENEFIT_NAME, TL.BENEFIT_DESCRIPTION BENEFIT_DESCRIPTION, TL.BENEFIT_SHORT_SUMMARY BENEFIT_SHORT_SUMMARY, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_MP_BENEFITS_B B, IRC_MP_BENEFITS_TL TL WHERE B.BENEFIT_ID =TL.BENEFIT_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
